commands.review_summary:
The branch broadens outbound delivery fallback/recovery, mirrored session channel selection, Argus session metadata handling, context-overflow matching, plain-text sanitization, and Telegram polling logs.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives high-confidence reproduction paths for the blockers: enqueue a silent delivery while user-visible work is pending, call sendMessage with an invalid explicit channel plus mirrored delivery context, and use a configured session.store outside dirname(sessionFile)/sessions.json for Argus lock inspection.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor proof plus maintainer split/replacement judgment; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof and the remaining blockers cross routing security, queue semantics, and protocol/store design.

target.title: fix(core): harden delivery fallback and outbound recovery
target.author: haiyuzhong1980
